test-case.description: Should skip restore point creation
test-case.name: additional-maintenance.ps1.NoRestorePoint flag.Should skip restore point creation

test-case.name: allow-scripts.ps1.Script functions.Should run Disable-ScriptExecution without errors and configure correctly

test-case.name: Debloat-Windows Script Initialization.Should safely source the script without executing the main loop

test-case.name: Debloat-Windows Script Initialization.Should export the expected phase functions

test-case.description: Should run Run-SystemCleanup without errors
test-case.name: Phase Functions Execution.Should run Run-SystemCleanup without errors

test-case.name: Write-Status.Should add to script:Results with default INFO status

test-case.description: Should add to script:Results with provided status
test-case.name: Write-Status.Should add to script:Results with provided status

test-case.description: Should skip if source does not exist
test-case.name: Deploy-ConfigFile.Should skip if source does not exist

test-case.description: Should copy if destination does not exist
test-case.name: Deploy-ConfigFile.Should copy if destination does not exist

test-case.description: Should skip if destination exists and hashes match
test-case.name: Deploy-ConfigFile.Should skip if destination exists and hashes match

test-case.description: Should overwrite if hashes differ
test-case.name: Deploy-ConfigFile.Should overwrite if hashes differ

test-case.description: Should skip if source directory does not exist
test-case.name: Deploy-ConfigDirectory.Should skip if source directory does not exist

test-case.description: Should deploy multiple files
test-case.name: Deploy-ConfigDirectory.Should deploy multiple files

test-case.description: Should return path if it exists
test-case.name: Get-CallOfDutyPlayersPath.Should return path if it exists

test-case.description: Should return null if path does not exist
test-case.name: Get-CallOfDutyPlayersPath.Should return null if path does not exist

test-case.description: Generates XML configuration with DLSS override enabled
test-case.name: DLSS-force-latest.ps1 functions.New-DLSSInspectorConfig.Generates XML configuration with DLSS override enabled

test-case.description: Generates XML configuration with DLSS override disabled
test-case.name: DLSS-force-latest.ps1 functions.New-DLSSInspectorConfig.Generates XML configuration with DLSS override disabled

test-case.description: Initializes UI and downloads Inspector.exe if it doesn't exist
test-case.name: DLSS-force-latest.ps1 functions.Start-DLSSForceLatestMenu.Initializes UI and downloads Inspector.exe if it doesn't exist

test-case.description: Initializes UI and skips downloading Inspector.exe if it exists
test-case.name: DLSS-force-latest.ps1 functions.Start-DLSSForceLatestMenu.Initializes UI and skips downloading Inspector.exe if it exists

test-case.description: Executes choice 1 (DLSS Force Latest: On)
test-case.name: DLSS-force-latest.ps1 functions.Start-DLSSForceLatestMenu.Executes choice 1 (DLSS Force Latest: On)

test-case.description: Executes choice 3 (DLSS Overlay: On)
test-case.name: DLSS-force-latest.ps1 functions.Start-DLSSForceLatestMenu.Executes choice 3 (DLSS Overlay: On)

test-case.name: fix-system.ps1.Script functions.Should run Start-SystemFix in DryRun mode without errors

test-case.name: fix-system.ps1.Script functions.Should run Start-SystemFix in QuickScan mode without errors

test-case.description: Should skip CHKDSK when SkipDiskCheck is provided
test-case.name: fix-system.ps1.Script functions.Should skip CHKDSK when SkipDiskCheck is provided

test-case.name: gpu-display-manager.ps1 functions.Set-HDCP.Calls Set-NvidiaGpuRegistryValue with correct parameters

test-case.description: Should load the module and functions without execution
test-case.name: Install-Packages.Initialization.Should load the module and functions without execution

test-case.description: Should bypass system features when SkipSystemFeatures is provided
test-case.name: Install-Packages.Parameters functionality.Should bypass system features when SkipSystemFeatures is provided

test-case.description: Should not apply post-install when ApplyPostInstall is missing
test-case.name: Install-Packages.Parameters functionality.Should not apply post-install when ApplyPostInstall is missing

test-case.name: Install-Packages.Parameters functionality.Should apply post-install when ApplyPostInstall is provided

test-case.description: Should define expected UI manipulation functions
test-case.name: Network-Tweaker.ps1.Should define expected UI manipulation functions

test-case.description: Should fail when winget is not found and shell-setup.ps1 is missing
test-case.name: Start-SetupWin11.When prerequisite is missing.Should fail when winget is not found and shell-setup.ps1 is missing

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.

test-case.description: Should succeed
test-case.name: Start-SetupWin11.When prerequisites are present.Should succeed

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.

test-case.description: Should return if Steam is not found in registry
test-case.name: Invoke-ShaderCacheCleanup.Steam Detection.Should return if Steam is not found in registry

test-case.description: Should return if Steam executable is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-ShaderCacheCleanup.Steam Detection.Should return if Steam executable is missing

test-case.description: Should correctly resolve Steam directories and clear caches
test-case.name: Invoke-ShaderCacheCleanup.Cache Clearing Execution.Should correctly resolve Steam directories and clear caches

test-case.description: Should not execute main logic when dot-sourced
test-case.name: shell-setup.ps1.Script execution guard.Should not execute main logic when dot-sourced

test-case.description: Should define required functions
test-case.name: shell-setup.ps1.Function Definitions.Should define required functions

test-case.description: Should log an error and return if Test-Path fails

test-case.description: Should log an error and return if Get-ItemProperty throws
test-case.name: steam.ps1.Steam is not found.Should log an error and return if Get-ItemProperty throws

test-case.description: Should execute the full optimization flow and start Steam
test-case.name: steam.ps1.Steam is found and running.Should execute the full optimization flow and start Steam

test-case.description: Should execute the optimization flow and start Steam if not running
test-case.name: steam.ps1.Steam is found and running.Should execute the optimization flow and start Steam if not running

test-case.description: Should run correct commands for target volume

test-case.description: Should run correct commands for all volumes

test-case.description: Should throw error if directory is missing

test-case.description: Should perform cleanup commands if directory exists

failure.message: DriveNotFoundException: Cannot find drive. A drive with the name 'C' does not exist.

test-case.description: Executes a command and returns successfully if exit code is allowed

test-case.description: Throws an error if the exit code is not allowed
test-case.name: Invoke-NativeCommand.Throws an error if the exit code is not allowed

test-case.description: Returns empty array when Get-NetAdapter fails or is not available

test-case.description: Returns adapter names when Get-NetAdapter succeeds

test-case.description: Removes an item without throwing if it doesn't exist
